results.notes: Record cold launch, resume and upgrade result.
Use a dedicated test account and redact the address or phone number.
Test allow, deny and Settings recovery without retaining personal photos.
Record reciprocal test profiles and deterministic match outcome.
Use synthetic content and verify delivery, retry and restart.
Verify proposal, acceptance and safety-plan states.
Verify blocked access is denied from both accounts.
Deny camera, microphone, photos and location, then recover safely.
Verify useful errors, retry and durable state after force-close.
Verify privacy changes and deletion-request acknowledgement.
